major_achievements.pwa: Full PWA support with manifest and Service Worker.
major_achievements.sensors: DeviceMotion and Geolocation integrated with iOS security compliance (User Gesture requirement).
major_achievements.state_management: Resolved race conditions between optimistic updates and API polls using strategic re-frame event design.

lessons_learned: iOS Safari requires sync callstack from user gesture for sensor permissions.
VisibilityChange is essential for mobile PWA data sync reliability.
Merging local atom state with global app-db is best for stable form inputs.
remaining_debt: Hardcoded IP in api.cljs should be moved to build configuration.
Wake Lock API for keeping screen on during active tracking.

future_roadmap.task: Set up production server with domain and valid SSL.
